word: G461 - ἀνορθόω - anorthóō - an-orth-o'-o - Lift up

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to set up, make erect: a crooked person, to rear again, build anew
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G303 and a derivative of the base of G3717; to straighten up: - lift (set) up, make straight.
